pharma.title: Industry body seeks govt aid to tide over disruptions in the pharma and MedTech sectors
pharma.summary: The Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) has petitioned the Department of Pharmaceuticals for freight subsidies and drug pricing relaxations as West Asia tensions double shipping costs and spike API prices by 30%.

pharma.title: Emcure cuts GLP drug Poviztra price by 55%
pharma.summary: Emcure Pharmaceuticals has announced a massive 55% price cut for Poviztra, its semaglutide weight-management drug in India.

pharma.title: Stocks in news: IndiGo, Sammaan Capital, Bharti Airtel, GRSE, Coforge
pharma.summary: Markets experienced a sharp sell-off on Monday's monthly expiry day, with the Nifty closing near 22,331. Key companies like IndiGo, Bharti Airtel, and GRSE are in focus due to significant news. IndiGo appointed William Walsh as CEO, while Bharti Airtel...

diagnostics.title: Molbio Diagnostics digital radiology arm secures EU MDR certification for imaging portfolio
diagnostics.summary: The certification, issued by TÜV SÜD Product Service GmbH, marks company to expand into globally regulated markets and reflects its adherence to international standards for safety, quality, and clinical performance.
diagnostics.thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.
